items.title: Telles: Card Spotlight
items.description: Check out this reveal video for Ace Navigator Telles, coming to Foundry in patch 0.8.0. Any poker fans out there?

items.title: New Hero: Thale, University Provost
items.description: An Influential Scholar who synergizes with 0 Influence Heroes. Provost Thale philosophizes that genius is not a random spark, but a reproducible formula.

items.title: New Show Match!
items.description: Provost Thale and Brother Corbin go head-to-head in this tournament style show match, highlighting the Intuits and Scholar Factions.

items.title: DevBlog: 10,000 Reworks
items.description: Explaining the thought process behind the core set design. An open call for card designers. And a hint about what's next!

items.title: The (Last) Empress Mini-Cinematic
items.description: Learn the lore behind The (Last) Empress, a Visionary from the Foundry Core Set

items.title: New Hero: Brother Corbin
items.description: An Intuit who utilizes Charges, Brother Corbin maintains the Imperial nuclear reactors that primitive locals now worship as divine.
